---
title: "Mary Isabella Smith"
---

## Mary Isabella Smith

**Dates:** (before 1823-1878)

**Maiden name:** (Bogue)

### Description

daughter of Captain Richard Bogue

### Biography

It seems reasonable to identify Mary Bogue with this person, who married on 22 November 1838 the Reverend Francis Smith (1810-1851), Rector of Tarrant Rushton, 5th son of Sir John Wyldbore Smith, 2nd Bt. and Elizabeth Anne Marriott. Richard Bogue was JBY’s godfather, see Coleridge, <i>Life</i> 74. He was probably FMY\'s first cousin, son (or perhaps grandson) of her father\'s aunt Mary (Bargus) Bogue.

### Letters

- Letter from Wednesday 5 [December 1838]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
